debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M : Set β
h : @Graph.IsMaxMatching α β G M
⊢ M.encard = @Graph.MatchingNumber α β G

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have h₁ : M.encard ≤ ν(G) := IsMatching.encard_le hM
  have h₂ : ν(G) ≤ M.encard := by
    have h₃ : ν(G) = sSup {n | ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ n = M.encard} := rfl
    rw [h₃]
    apply csSup_le
    · -- Show that the set is nonempty
      refine' ⟨M.encard, _⟩
      exact ⟨M, h.toIsMatching, rfl⟩
    · -- Show that M.encard is an upper bound for the set
      intro n hn
      rcases hn with ⟨M', hM', hn⟩
      have h₄ : M'.encard ≤ M.encard := h.max M' hM'
      rw [hn] at *
      exact h₄
  -- Combine the two inequalities to get the desired equality
  le_antisymm h₁ h₂
